name: Create Requisition (Manager)
description: Manager creates a new job requisition with basic job details and organisational information.

name: Create Requisition (Recruiter)
description: Recruiter creates or refines a job requisition with additional recruiting-specific details.

name: Post Job
description: Recruiter posts the approved requisition to internal and external job boards.

name: Screen Candidates
description: Recruiter reviews applicants, shortlists candidates, and updates their status.

name: Conduct Interview (Manager)
description: Manager conducts interviews and provides structured feedback.

name: Conduct Interview (Recruiter)
description: Recruiter coordinates interviews, captures notes, and manages scheduling.

name: Create Offer
description: HR Admin prepares and issues an offer to the selected candidate.
